name: Cumin Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon finely chopped fresh green chilies
1 large lemon, rind and juice, finely grated and squeezed
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the marinade ingredients.
2. Place the chicken pieces in an oven-proof dish.
3. Pour the yogurt mixture over the chicken and marinate for one to two hours, stirring occasionally.
4. Cover with foil and bake at 375°F for 45 to 60 minutes, or until the chicken is tender.
5. Serve with rice.
Per serving: Cal 192 / Prot 30g / Fiber .4g / Carb 7g / Unsat Fat 2g / Fat 4g
